The '''firebrand''' was a style of [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|lightsaber hilt]] with a thin [[Color/Legends|black]] body that was ribbed along the lower half to offer a stable grip. One end of the [[Hilt/Legends|hilt]] was flared to store [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]] with the [[Activation stud|activation switch]] situated on top. The other side featured a thin deflector ring to protect from energy backwash.<ref name="CSWE" /> By [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' to [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].</ref> the hilt was typical among [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|273|firebrand}}</ref> founder of the [[New Jedi Order]].<ref name="New">{{CSWECite|II|151|Jedi Order}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The firebrand lightsaber hilt first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' as an option to customize the Jedi [[Jaden Korr]]'s [[Jaden Korr's first lightsaber|two]] [[Jaden Korr's second lightsaber|lightsaber]]s.<ref name="Jedi">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>
